testcase.name: Root_Returns_200
testcase.system-out:
@scenario.begin
scenario: Root returns 200 given the mock API client is ready ... Status.passed in 0.0002179s when I GET "/" ... Status.passed in 0.006308s then the status code should be 200 ... Status.passed in 5.603e-05s @scenario.end ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

testcase.name: Slow_Endpoint_Completes_With_200
testcase.system-out:
@scenario.begin
scenario: Slow endpoint completes with 200 given the mock API client is ready ... Status.passed in 0.0001342s when I GET "/slow" ... Status.passed in 2.004s then the status code should be 200 ... Status.passed in 0.000165s @scenario.end ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

testcase.name: Forced_Error_Endpoint_Returns_500
testcase.system-out:
@scenario.begin
scenario: Forced error endpoint returns 500 given the mock API client is ready ... Status.passed in 0.0005541s when I GET "/error" ... Status.passed in 0.002556s then the status code should be 500 ... Status.passed in 0.0001209s @scenario.end ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

testcase.name: Flaky_Endpoint_Returns_200_Or_500
testcase.system-out:
@scenario.begin
scenario: Flaky endpoint returns 200 or 500 given the mock API client is ready ... Status.passed in 0.0003169s when I GET "/flaky" ... Status.passed in 0.002604s then the status code should be one of 200, 500 ... Status.passed in 0.0001128s @scenario.end ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

testcase.name: Chaos_Endpoint_Returns_200,_401,_Or_500
testcase.system-out:
@scenario.begin
scenario: Chaos endpoint returns 200, 401, or 500 given the mock API client is ready ... Status.passed in 0.0002809s when I GET "/chaos" ... Status.passed in 4.065s then the status code should be one of 200, 401, 500 ... Status.passed in 0.000169s @scenario.end ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

testcase.name: Secure_Without_Token_Returns_401
testcase.system-out:
@scenario.begin
scenario: Secure without token returns 401 given the mock API client is ready ... Status.passed in 0.0004151s when I GET "/secure" ... Status.passed in 0.003399s then the status code should be 401 ... Status.passed in 0.0001311s @scenario.end ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

testcase.name: Admin_Without_Token_Returns_401
testcase.system-out:
@scenario.begin
scenario: Admin without token returns 401 given the mock API client is ready ... Status.passed in 0.0004332s when I GET "/admin" ... Status.passed in 0.002908s then the status code should be 401 ... Status.passed in 0.0001309s @scenario.end ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

testcase.name: Login_Returns_200_And_A_Token
testcase.system-out:
@scenario.begin
scenario: Login returns 200 and a token given the mock API client is ready ... Status.passed in 0.0002861s when I POST to "/login" with JSON ... Status.passed in 0.003762s then the status code should be 200 ... Status.passed in 0.000128s then the JSON field "token" should exist ... Status.passed in 0.0001249s @scenario.end ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

testcase.name: Secure_With_Bearer_Returns_200
testcase.system-out:
@scenario.begin
scenario: Secure with bearer returns 200 given the mock API client is ready ... Status.passed in 0.0002661s given I am logged in as "alice" ... Status.passed in 0.002147s when I GET "/secure" as authenticated user ... Status.passed in 0.002704s then the status code should be 200 ... Status.passed in 8.798e-05s @scenario.end ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

testcase.name: Admin_With_Bearer_Returns_200
testcase.system-out:
@scenario.begin
scenario: Admin with bearer returns 200 given the mock API client is ready ... Status.passed in 0.0002372s given I am logged in as "bob" ... Status.passed in 0.001827s when I GET "/admin" as authenticated user ... Status.passed in 0.001729s then the status code should be 200 ... Status.passed in 7.701e-05s @scenario.end ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

testcase.name: Submit_Accepts_Json_Payload
testcase.system-out:
@scenario.begin
scenario: Submit accepts JSON payload given the mock API client is ready ... Status.passed in 0.0001879s when I POST to "/submit" with JSON ... Status.passed in 0.001612s then the status code should be 200 ... Status.passed in 6.89e-05s then the JSON field "received" should be true ... Status.passed in 7.105e-05s @scenario.end ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

testcase.name: Items_List_Is_Empty_Initially
testcase.system-out:
@scenario.begin
scenario: Items list is empty initially given the mock API client is ready ... Status.passed in 0.0001783s when I GET "/items" ... Status.passed in 0.00145s then the status code should be 200 ... Status.passed in 7.701e-05s @scenario.end ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

testcase.name: Create_Item_Returns_200
testcase.system-out:
@scenario.begin
scenario: Create item returns 200 given the mock API client is ready ... Status.passed in 0.0002203s when I POST to "/items" with JSON ... Status.passed in 0.00174s then the status code should be 200 ... Status.passed in 6.866e-05s then the JSON field "created" should be true ... Status.passed in 7.51e-05s @scenario.end ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

testcase.name: Get_Created_Item_By_Id
testcase.system-out:
@scenario.begin
scenario: Get created item by id given the mock API client is ready ... Status.passed in 0.0001562s when I POST to "/items" with JSON ... Status.passed in 0.0012s then the status code should be 200 ... Status.passed in 6.294e-05s when I GET "/items/1" ... Status.passed in 0.001332s then the status code should be 200 ... Status.passed in 6.08e-05s @scenario.end ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

testcase.name: Delete_Item_Returns_200
testcase.system-out:
@scenario.begin
scenario: Delete item returns 200 given the mock API client is ready ... Status.passed in 0.000155s when I POST to "/items" with JSON ... Status.passed in 0.001185s then the status code should be 200 ... Status.passed in 6.175e-05s when I DELETE "/items/1" ... Status.passed in 0.001319s then the status code should be 200 ... Status.passed in 6.08e-05s @scenario.end ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

testcase.name: Deleted_Item_Returns_404
testcase.system-out:
@scenario.begin
scenario: Deleted item returns 404 given the mock API client is ready ... Status.passed in 0.00015s when I POST to "/items" with JSON ... Status.passed in 0.001247s then the status code should be 200 ... Status.passed in 6.7e-05s when I DELETE "/items/1" ... Status.passed in 0.001084s then the status code should be 200 ... Status.passed in 5.412e-05s when I GET "/items/1" ... Status.passed in 0.0009961s then the status code should be 404 ... Status.passed in 5.102e-05s @scenario.end ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
